builderStatic.notes: Builder-static residual questions were resolved via accepted external live-verification evidence. A later broader GUI reconnaissance report was critically normalized into a builder action map without promoting mixed-confidence or template-instance details into canon. Current canon includes publish-panel structure, sections-panel structure, viewport-dependent background/page action visibility, panel docking semantics for do-ui-previous/do-ui-next, and a normalized Builder GUI action map with explicit caveats.

templateInstance.notes: On 2026-06-27 the canonical main-template was published with explicit v2 CDN embeds and v2 markup. Live verification on mini.crd.co confirmed all seven v2 assets, zero legacy carrd-plugins assets, required markers, and initialized cards, grid, switcher, slider, faq, modal, cookie-banner, header-nav, and shopping-cart behavior.

reason: The canonical main-template is published with v2 assets and markup; live runtime verification passed on mini.crd.co.
freshScanRequiredWhen: plugin sync or deterministic audit is requested and artifacts are incomplete
meaningful template or plugin changes happened after the latest full scan
